basic_details.job_title: RSLSA Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 69 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Rajasthan State Legal Services Authority (RSLSA) Panel Advocate Notification 2026 has been released on 27 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 69 vacancies have been announced through the RSLSA Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Registered with Bar Council of Rajasthan, Minimum 3 years continuous practice as advocate
qualification.details: Registered with Bar Council of Rajasthan. Minimum 3 years continuous practice as an advocate.

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications Merit based on experience and submitted judgments Panel formation by DLSA/TLSC
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RSLSA Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://rajasthan.nalsa.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RSLSA Panel Advocate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the RSLSA Panel Advocate recruitment is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Panel Advocate post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 69 vacancies for the Panel Advocate post released by the Rajasthan State Legal Services Authority (RSLSA).

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Panel Advocate position?
faq.answer: Candidates must be registered with the Bar Council of Rajasthan and have a minimum of 3 years of continuous practice as an advocate to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the RSLSA Panel Advocate recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for RSLSA Panel Advocate posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the RSLSA Panel Advocate recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Panel Advocate role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the scrutiny of applications, followed by a merit-based assessment of experience and submitted judgments. Finally, a panel will be formed by the DLSA/TLSC.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of RSLSA, which is https://rajasthan.nalsa.gov.in/. Links are also provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Panel Advocate position?
faq.answer: The Panel Advocate position is a contractual job type under the Rajasthan State Legal Services Authority (RSLSA).

faq.question: Q9. Does RSLSA provide any salary for Panel Advocates?
faq.answer: The salary details for the Panel Advocate position are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for specific salary information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this RSLSA Panel Advocate recruitment is F 2(137)/2025/RALSA/P.A./DS-I/363.
